summary: Wrote 110 comprehensive unit tests for suite-core/core/api_fuzzer.py achieving 100% line coverage (137/137 lines). All 110 tests pass in 0.19s with zero skips or assert-True stubs.
key_patterns: Async tests use plain 'async def' with pytest-asyncio auto mode (pyproject.toml asyncio_mode=auto)
httpx mocked via patch('core.api_fuzzer.httpx.AsyncClient') for headers test; patch('httpx.AsyncClient') for context manager tests
httpx.Response constructed via httpx.Response(status_code=N, text=S) without network calls
Python 3.14 event loop: do NOT use asyncio.get_event_loop().run_until_complete() — use async def test methods instead
